tracking.elevation_below_horizon: Elevation of target below the horizon

map_settings.enable_map_dragging_desc: Allow click-and-drag panning on the map. When off, use the arrow buttons to pan.
map_settings.enable_map_zooming_desc: Allow mouse wheel, pinch, and double-click zoom on the map. When off, use the +/- buttons.
map_settings.auto_switch_planetarium_visibility: Auto-switch planetarium when target is visible
map_settings.auto_switch_planetarium_visibility_desc: For satellite targets: use planetarium above horizon and switch back to globe below horizon.

shared.rotator_assignment_runtime: Target assignment is resolved at runtime from current rotator ownership.
shared.unpark_before_observation: Unpark before observation start (if currently parked)
shared.enable_bias_t_help: Turns Bias-T on during the observation; it will be switched off at the end.
shared.auto_center_frequency_help: Automatically optimize frequency to cover all transmitters and avoid DC spike
shared.remove_sdr_session_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this SDR session?
shared.bandwidth_validation_error: Required bandwidth for the combination of transmitters you chose ({{required}} MHz) exceeds the selected SDR sample rate ({{sampleRate}} MHz). Please increase sample rate or select transmitters closer in frequency.
shared.enable_frequency_shift_help: Centers the signal at the target frequency. Some SDRs have center spikes that can contaminate a centered signal, so shifting will move the target transmitter signal to the center to improve decoding. Some applications require the target to be centered.
shared.audio_recording_help: Audio will be recorded in WAV format (16-bit PCM, mono, 48kHz) after demodulation.
shared.transcription_help: Audio transcription will be performed using the selected modulation type.
shared.iq_recording_help: IQ data will be recorded in SigMF format (cf32_le).
shared.iq_recording_help_shifted: Frequency shifting will center the signal at the target frequency, avoiding DC offset issues.
shared.iq_recording_help_sample_rate: The recording uses the SDR sample rate configured above.
shared.decimation_center_hint: Decimation assumes the target signal is centered. Enable Frequency Shift to center your signal before decimating.
shared.run_satdump_post_processing_label: Run SatDump post-processing after IQ recording
shared.delete_iq_after_satdump_label: Delete IQ recording after SatDump completes

observation.new_subtitle: Once created and enabled, this observation will run automatically at the selected pass window.
observation.enabled_help: When enabled, this observation will be executed at the scheduled time
observation.satellite_help: Select a satellite using search or browse by group.
observation.no_tasks_added: No tasks added. Add decoders, audio recording, transcription, or IQ recording tasks.
observation.confirm_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete the observation {{name}}?
observation.cancel_observation_message: Are you sure you want to cancel the observation {{name}}?
observation.cancel_observation_warning: This will immediately cancel the observation and remove all scheduled jobs.

monitored.new_subtitle: Once monitored, the scheduler will automatically create new observations for upcoming passes that match these criteria.
monitored.enabled_help: When enabled, this satellite will automatically generate observations for matching passes
monitored.minimum_peak_elevation_help: Only passes with peak elevation above this threshold will be scheduled
monitored.task_start_elevation_error: Must be less than or equal to Minimum Peak Elevation
monitored.task_start_elevation_help: Observation tasks will start executing when satellite reaches this elevation
monitored.lookahead_window_help: How far ahead to automatically generate observations
monitored.no_tasks_added: No tasks added yet. Add decoders, audio recording, transcription, or IQ recording.

observations.title: Scheduled Observations
observations.load_error: Could not load scheduled observations. Check backend connection and retry.
observations.all_rows_hidden: All rows are hidden by status filters.
observations.delete_confirm_message_one: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} observation? This action cannot be undone.
observations.delete_confirm_message_other: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} observations? This action cannot be undone.
observations.cancel_single_question: Are you sure you want to cancel the observation {{name}}?
observations.cancel_single_warning: This will immediately cancel the observation and remove all scheduled jobs.
observations.cancel_multiple_question_one: Are you sure you want to cancel {{count}} observation?
observations.cancel_multiple_question_other: Are you sure you want to cancel {{count}} observations?
observations.cancel_multiple_warning: This will immediately cancel all selected observations and remove their scheduled jobs.

monitored.title: Monitored Satellites
monitored.auto_generation_body: Satellites in this list will automatically generate scheduled observations for all upcoming passes that meet the specified criteria (minimum elevation, lookahead window).
monitored.regenerate_selected_tooltip: Regenerate observations for the selected satellite only
monitored.regenerate_select_one_tooltip: Please select exactly one satellite to regenerate observations
monitored.regenerate_all_enabled_tooltip: Regenerate observations for ALL enabled satellites
monitored.delete_confirm_message_one: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} monitored satellite? This will stop automatic observation generation for this satellite.
monitored.delete_confirm_message_other: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} monitored satellites? This will stop automatic observation generation for these satellites.
monitored.delete_observations_checkbox: Also delete all scheduled observations for these satellites
monitored.no_enabled_message: There are no enabled monitored satellites. Enable at least one monitor to regenerate observations.

settings.title: Observations Table Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize which columns are visible in the observations table.

scheduler_banner.no_active_or_upcoming: No active or upcoming observations scheduled
scheduler_banner.stop_confirm_question: Are you sure you want to stop the observation {{name}}?
scheduler_banner.stop_confirm_warning: This will immediately stop the observation and remove all scheduled jobs.
scheduler_banner.abort_confirm_question: Are you sure you want to abort the observation {{name}}?
scheduler_banner.abort_confirm_warning: This will cancel the scheduled observation and remove all scheduled jobs.
